case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. et al VS AMEPEROSA, SHARON K.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN:JW.JEFFERSON WS20 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K. $936.77 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $936.77, TIME PAYMENT AGREEMENT ON THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENT OF MARCH 17, 1999: PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $90.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON APRIL 7, 1999 AND ON THE 07TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.

PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN:JW.JEFFERSON WS20 PETITION MAILED ON DEC 04, 2009

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,288.05 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN:JW.JEFFERSON WS20 AS TO DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN:JW.JEFFERSON WS20 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K. $3,188.05 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,209.05, THE STIPULATED AMT IS TO RUN CONCURRENT W/ THE AGREEMENT IN THE WELFARE FRAUD DIVERSION CASE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $90.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON APRIL 7, 1999 AND ON THE 07TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,272.28 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K.

APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AMUN. CORP. DEPT.OF HUMAN SERVICES ATTN:JW.JEFFERSON WS20 AS TO DEFENDANT AMEPEROSA, SHARON K. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
